channel.title: Jessica Rojas — Blog
channel.description: Cybersecurity, compliance, DevOps, and career insights from a CISSP-certified Enterprise Systems Manager and U.S. Army veteran.

item.title: Deploying on GoDaddy VPS: An 8-Phase Guide
item.description: A practical walkthrough for deploying a production web server on a GoDaddy VPS — from initial SSH access through SSL, Nginx, firewall hardening, and automation.

item.title: CI/CD with GitHub Actions
item.description: End-to-end guide to building a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline — lint, test, build, and deploy to production automatically.

item.title: API Security Best Practices
item.description: REST API security from authentication to rate limiting — practical patterns using OAuth 2.0, JWT, input validation, and OWASP guidance.

item.title: Linux Server Hardening for CMMC
item.description: Step-by-step Linux hardening guide aligned with CMMC Level 2 and DoD STIGs — SSH lockdown, auditd, firewall, and CIS benchmark application.

item.title: Docker & Container Security
item.description: Securing Docker containers from image hygiene to runtime protection — rootless mode, capabilities, read-only filesystems, and image scanning.

item.title: Incident Response: The First 48 Hours
item.description: A practical playbook for the first 48 hours of an incident — detection, containment, eradication, and the communication strategies that determine outcomes.

item.title: Deploying a Web Server on a Linux VPS
item.description: Full walkthrough of deploying Nginx on a Linux VPS — from initial setup through SSL, reverse proxy, and firewall configuration.

item.title: Zero Trust Architecture: A Practical Guide
item.description: Implementing Zero Trust beyond the buzzword — identity verification, microsegmentation, and continuous monitoring in practice.

item.title: Cyber GRC: Governance, Risk, and Compliance Explained
item.description: A plain-English breakdown of GRC frameworks — how governance, risk management, and compliance intersect in real organizations.

item.title: Risk and Opportunity in Modern Cybersecurity
item.description: Why risk management isn't just about threats — understanding the opportunity side of the equation and how to present it to leadership.

item.title: AI in Cyber Defense: Risk or Opportunity?
item.description: Unpacking the dual-use nature of AI in cybersecurity — where it strengthens defenses and where it amplifies attacker capabilities.

item.title: Lessons from the Battlefield: Military Discipline in Cybersecurity
item.description: How military training — mission clarity, decision-making under pressure, and disciplined process — translates directly to leading security programs.

item.title: How to Prepare for CMMC Compliance
item.description: A practical guide to preparing for CMMC Level 2 — from scoping and gap analysis through SSP authoring and C3PAO assessment readiness.
